hypotheses.name: Gene annotation via edge dataset + SV1/SV2 identity
hypotheses.method: Mapped 361 gene names from cycle1_edge_dataset.tsv to embedding indices. Classified named genes into zero-norm (n=66) vs nonzero (n=295). SVD of centered nonzero L11 embeddings. Scored immune cell-type markers (B-cell, T-cell, Myeloid, GC_TF, NK) on SV1/SV2.
hypotheses.result_value: B-cell=-0.017, T-cell=-0.016, Myeloid=-0.009; zero-norm named genes are tissue-specific (TFAP2B, SNAI2, TYR, PGR, TBX5)
hypotheses.next_action: Recover full gene vocabulary (all 4941 gene names) to identify top SV1 genes; GO/STRING enrichment for SV1 axis

hypotheses.name: Full spectral decay curve across 12 layers
hypotheses.method: SVD of centered nonzero-only embeddings (n=2039, 512-dim) at each of 12 layers. Computed eff_rank (entropy-weighted), SPR (participation ratio), k90 (dims for 90% variance), Frobenius norm, SV1 singular value trajectory.
hypotheses.next_action: Compute spectral decay separately for cell-type gene subsets (B-cell vs T-cell vs random) to test biologically differentiated compression

hypotheses.name: Wasserstein/transport distance between consecutive layers
hypotheses.method: Sliced Wasserstein Distance (100 projections), energy distance, centroid displacement, and covariance Frobenius distance between consecutive layer embeddings of n=2039 nonzero genes. Cumulative SWD from L0. Spearman rho(SWD, eff_rank_drop).
hypotheses.result_value: rho=-0.46, p=0.15 (not significant). SWD range 0.29-0.55, largest at L0->L1 (0.55), smallest at L10->L11 (0.29). Cumulative SWD from L0 reaches 1.32 at L10.
hypotheses.next_action: Compare SWD to shuffled-embedding null to establish baseline; if real < null, transport is constrained by structure
